scripts.smoke:mobile-submit-readiness: npm --prefix mobile run release:submit:check && npm --prefix mobile run release:creator-proof:check
scripts.smoke:mobile-release: npm run smoke:mobile-submit-readiness && npm --prefix mobile run release:post-submit:check
scripts.smoke:report-export-artifacts: NODE_OPTIONS='--conditions react-server' npm exec -- tsx scripts/smoke-report-export-artifacts.ts
scripts.smoke:payment-spine: npm run check:stripe-payments && npm run smoke:service-fee-gate && npm run smoke:large-campaign-creation && npm run smoke:large-campaign-capacity && npm run smoke:stripe-checkout && npm run smoke:stripe-negative && npm run smoke:stripe-cancelled && npm run smoke:stripe-recovery && npm run smoke:admin-service-fee-override
scripts.smoke:global-proof-room: npm run smoke:clean-next && npm run smoke:release-candidate-story && npm run smoke:content-report-workflow && npm run smoke:content-report-recovery && npm run smoke:report-export-ui && npm run smoke:report-share-revoke && npm run smoke:clean-next && npm run smoke:report-export-artifacts && npm run smoke:admin-report-command-center && npm run smoke:large-campaign-creation && npm run smoke:large-campaign-capacity
scripts.smoke:critical: npm run smoke:campaign-detail && npm run smoke:creator-campaign && npm run smoke:public-apply && npm run smoke:service-fee-gate && npm run smoke:application-flow && npm run smoke:application-acceptance && npm run smoke:counter-offer && npm run smoke:content-report-workflow && npm run smoke:measurement-contract && npm run smoke:content-report-recovery && npm run smoke:content-report-late && npm run smoke:content-report-excused
scripts.smoke:release-bad-paths: npm run smoke:payment-spine && npm run smoke:content-report-recovery && npm run smoke:report-share-revoke && npm run smoke:campaign-lifecycle-matrix && npm run smoke:campaign-deadline-boundary && npm run smoke:completed-campaign-invite-lock && npm run smoke:completed-campaign-application-lock && npm run smoke:completed-campaign-work-lock
scripts.smoke:web-release: npm run smoke:clean-next && npm run smoke:critical && npm run smoke:release-bad-paths && npm run smoke:notification-email && npm run smoke:notification-queue:audit && npm run smoke:notification-preferences && npm run smoke:report-correction-notification && npm run smoke:queue-backed-email && npm run smoke:product-notification-actions && npm run smoke:admin-control-tower && npm run smoke:admin-report-command-center && npm run smoke:admin-communications-retry && npm run smoke:brand-access-approval && npm run smoke:brand-team-lifecycle && npm run smoke:brand-team-invite-ui && npm run smoke:brand-role-permissions && npm run smoke:campaign-responsibilities && npm run smoke:admin-direct-email && npm run smoke:admin-settings-governance && npm run smoke:privacy-controls && npm run smoke:report-export-ui && npm run smoke:report-export-artifacts && npm run smoke:release-candidate-story
scripts.smoke:release: npm run smoke:clean-next && npm run smoke:critical && npm run smoke:release-bad-paths && npm run smoke:notification-email && npm run smoke:notification-queue:audit && npm run smoke:notification-preferences && npm run smoke:report-correction-notification && npm run smoke:queue-backed-email && npm run smoke:product-notification-actions && npm run smoke:admin-control-tower && npm run smoke:admin-report-command-center && npm run smoke:admin-communications-retry && npm run smoke:brand-access-approval && npm run smoke:brand-team-lifecycle && npm run smoke:brand-team-invite-ui && npm run smoke:brand-role-permissions && npm run smoke:campaign-responsibilities && npm run smoke:admin-direct-email && npm run smoke:admin-settings-governance && npm run smoke:privacy-controls && npm run smoke:report-export-ui && npm run smoke:report-export-artifacts && npm run smoke:release-candidate-story
scripts.generate:i18n: npm run generate:public-i18n && npm run generate:platform-i18n && npm run generate:mobile-i18n
scripts.smoke:notification-preferences: NODE_OPTIONS='--conditions react-server' npm exec -- tsx scripts/smoke-notification-preferences.ts
scripts.smoke:brand-team-lifecycle: NODE_OPTIONS='--conditions react-server' npm exec -- tsx scripts/smoke-brand-team-lifecycle.ts
